name: Gemini API
description: Google's generative AI API providing access to the full Gemini model family (Pro, Flash, Flash-Lite) — one of the most generous free tiers in the industry with no credit card and no expiration.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits_rpm: 10-30 per model (Gemini 3 Flash: 10, Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: 15, Gemini 2.5 Flash: 10, Gemini 2.0 Flash: 15, Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite: 30)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits_rpd: 500-1,500 per model (Gemini 3 Flash: 1,500, Gemini 2.5 Flash Preview: 500, Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: 1,000)
free_tier_limits.monthly_free_usage: Metered per-model quotas (RPM/RPD/TPM) — no fixed monthly token cap beyond RPD limits
free_tier_limits.notes: CRITICAL: As of April 2026, ALL Pro-tier models removed from free tier (Gemini 3.1 Pro, 3 Pro, 2.5 Pro are paid-only). Free tier covers only Flash/Flash-Lite family. Enabling billing on a project REMOVES the free tier entirely. Limits are per Google Cloud project, not per API key. Free tier data may be used for training.

paid_tier_starting: $0.075/1M input tokens (Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite) to $2/1M (Gemini 3.1 Pro). Tiered rate limit scaling with spend.
notes: Google offers the most generous ongoing free tier among major providers. Largest context windows (up to 2M). As of June 2026, free tier covers only Flash/Flash-Lite models. Typical limits: 10-30 RPM, 250K-1M TPM, 500-1,500 RPD. Strengths: native multimodality (text+image+audio+video in one model), context caching (90% discount), batch processing (50% discount), 64K token output. Weaknesses: free tier data used for training, no SLA on free, Pro models removed from free tier Apr 2026, rate limits reduced ~50% Dec 2025.

name: OpenRouter
description: Unified API gateway providing access to 400+ AI models from 60+ providers through a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint with automatic fallback routing and unified billing.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits_tpm: varies by model and provider (soft limit via RPM/RPD)
free_tier_limits.monthly_free_usage: Unlimited access to :free models at 50 req/day. Small one-time free credit for testing paid models.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier gives 50 requests/day and 20 RPM total across ALL free models. No credit card. After $10+ lifetime purchase, free model limit increases to 1,000 requests/day. Free models use :free suffix and are lower priority with provider throttling. Only 4 providers available on free vs 60+ paid.

paid_tier_starting: Pay-as-you-go via credit purchase (minimum $5). 5.5% platform fee on Stripe purchases. No markup on provider inference pricing.
notes: Single API key for 400+ models. Auto-fallback across providers (Zero Completion Insurance). :nitro (speed), :floor (cost), :exacto (quality) routing variants. 250k+ apps, 4.2M+ users, 100T monthly tokens. Free models lower priority at peak times. 1M free BYOK requests/month for provider key passthrough.

name: Groq
description: Ultra-fast LLM inference API built on custom LPU silicon — delivers 394-1000+ tokens/sec on open-source models at 5-14x lower cost than GPU providers.

free_tier_limits.monthly_free_usage: No hard monthly cap — limited by daily rate limits
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier fully active as of June 2026. No CC needed. All models on free tier. RPD is binding constraint: 1,000/day on large models (~42 req/hr). Developer tier (add CC, zero minimum) unlocks 10x rate limits + 25% discount.

paid_tier_starting: Developer: zero minimum, 10x rate limits, 25% discount. Batch API at 50% off. Llama 3.1 8B $0.05/$0.08 per 1M tok, GPT-OSS 120B $0.15/$0.60.
notes: Custom LPU ASIC — not GPUs. 5-14x more tok/s than GPU providers. Raised $750M Sep 2025. NVIDIA $20B licensing deal Dec 2025. API is OpenAI-compatible. Speed: GPT-OSS 20B at 1,000+ t/s, Llama 3.3 70B at 394 t/s. Limited to open-source models only. Batch API at 50% off. Prompt caching at 50% off cached inputs.

name: Cerebras
description: AI inference API running on WSE-3 Wafer-Scale Engine chips — up to 15x faster than GPUs with OpenAI-compatible API.

free_tier_limits.context_window: 8,192 tokens (temporary cap on free tier only)
free_tier_limits.notes: Forever free tier, no credit card, no expiration. 5 req/min, 30K tok/min, 1M tok/day per model. Context on free capped at 8K. Paid: full context.

paid_tier_starting: Developer $10 prepay. gpt-oss-120b $0.35/M input, $0.75/M output. Cerebras Code Pro $50/mo.
notes: Custom CS-3 WSE chips (58x larger than GPUs). Only 2 active models (many deprecated). gpt-oss-120b at ~3000 tok/s. Recently IPO'd (April 2026). Partners: AWS, OpenRouter, HuggingFace. Very limited model selection but exceptionally generous free tier (1M tok/day).

name: NVIDIA NIM
description: NVIDIA Inference Microservices — free OpenAI-compatible API to 100+ AI models hosted on DGX Cloud. Prototype free, then self-host via AI Enterprise license.

free_tier_limits.free_credits: No credit system. Free access is forever — rate-limit-based, not trial.
free_tier_limits.notes: NVIDIA Developer Program required (free). For prototyping/research/dev only — no production. 77 of 139 models have free endpoints. Production requires AI Enterprise license ($4,500/GPU/year). API key prefix: nvapi-.

paid_tier_starting: NVIDIA AI Enterprise from $4,500/GPU/year. Partner hosting via Deep Infra, Together AI, CoreWeave.
notes: 100+ models on DGX Cloud (B200, H200, B300 GPUs). Spans LLMs, image gen (Flux, SD3), video (Cosmos 3), audio, embeddings, healthcare, climate. Runs NVIDIA-optimized inference stacks (TensorRT-LLM, Triton). Free tier deprecated credit system in early 2025, now permanent rate-limit-based free access.

name: Together AI
description: Full-stack AI Native Cloud platform for inference, fine-tuning, and GPU clusters — 200+ open-source models via OpenAI-compatible API.

free_tier_limits.context_window: varies by model (up to 1M tokens for MiniMax M3)
free_tier_limits.notes: $25 free credits, no CC. ~80 models permanently free (pricing=0). Credits used for paid models. After credits exhausted, minimum $5 purchase to continue. Startup Accelerator offers $15K-$50K credits.

paid_tier_starting: Chat models ~$0.03-$4.50/M input. Image gen $0.0006-$0.134/image. GPU clusters H100 $5.49-$6.49/hr.
notes: Founded 2022. Backed by FlashAttention-3/4 research. 200+ models. Serverless + Batch + Dedicated Endpoints + GPU Clusters. Free tier: $25 credits + ~80 permanently free models. Dynamic rate limits replaced fixed tiers. ISO 27001 certified. Customers: Cursor, Decagon, Pika.

name: Cohere
description: Enterprise AI platform specializing in secure LLMs for RAG, embedding, reranking, and text generation. Purpose-built for enterprise search and retrieval-augmented generation.

free_tier_limits.notes: Free Trial API key: no CC, access to all models, 1,000 calls/month across all endpoints. Not for production/commercial. 20 req/min on chat models.

paid_tier_starting: Command A $2.50/$10 per 1M tokens. Embed v4 $0.10/1M tokens. Rerank 3.5 $2.00/1K searches.
notes: Enterprise-first AI company (founded 2019, Toronto/SF). Differentiator: purpose-built RAG stack (Embed → Rerank → Command). Strong data privacy (VPC/on-prem, Model Vault). Clients: Oracle, Fujitsu, Salesforce, SAP, Notion. Models: Command A/A+/R/R7B, Embed 4, Rerank 4, Aya Expanse. Est. valuation $5-6B.

name: Hugging Face
description: The AI community platform with 2M+ models, 500K+ datasets, and 1M+ Spaces. Offers Serverless Inference API and Inference Providers (unified gateway to 15+ third-party APIs).

free_tier_limits.free_requests: $0.10/month Inference Provider credits for free users
free_tier_limits.notes: Serverless Inference API (~300 req/hr, models under ~10B params, cold starts) + $0.10/mo Provider credits. PRO ($9/mo): 2M credits/mo, 25 min/day H200 ZeroGPU, 10x storage.

paid_tier_starting: $9/month (PRO), $20/user/month (Team), $50/user/month (Enterprise)
notes: Three inference products: Serverless API (free ~300 req/hr), Inference Endpoints (dedicated GPU, $0.50-$6/hr), Inference Providers (unified gateway to Groq/Together/Cerebras/etc with pass-through pricing). OpenAI-compatible at router.huggingface.co/v1. 50K+ orgs (Google, Meta, Microsoft, Amazon).

name: Pollinations AI
description: Open-source unified AI inference API for text, image, audio, and video. OpenAI-compatible endpoint routing to 30+ models including GPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Mistral, Qwen.
signup_type: API key from enter.pollinations.ai (free account with regular pollen refills)

free_tier_limits.rate_limits_rpm: Secret keys (sk_): no rate limits. Publishable keys (pk_): 1 pollen/IP/hour.
free_tier_limits.free_credits: Free compute with regular refills based on activity tier. Pollen system: $1 ≈ 1 Pollen.
free_tier_limits.notes: No CC required. Free tier gets regular pollen refills for building and shipping. Heavy use requires pollen purchase or self-hosting (open source MIT).

paid_tier_starting: Pay-as-you-go via Pollen credits ($1 ≈ 1 Pollen). Self-hosting also available (open source).
notes: Berlin-based, operated by Myceli AI OÜ. Open source (MIT). 30+ text, 15 image, 5 video models. Earnt compute via pollen. 10K weekly active devs, 1.5M daily requests across 500+ live apps.

name: Stability AI
description: Provider of Stable Diffusion and generative media APIs for image, video, 3D, and audio generation. Credit-based platform with 25 free credits on signup.

free_tier_limits.free_credits: 25 credits ($0.25 value) one-time on Google signup
free_tier_limits.monthly_free_generations: 0 — one-time 25 credits, no recurring free tier
free_tier_limits.notes: 25 free credits on signup (no CC required). 1 credit = $0.01. No recurring free tier. Additional credits $10 for 1,000. Max 10 API keys per account.

paid_tier_starting: $10 = 1,000 credits. Stable Image Core: 3 credits/image ($0.03), Fast 3D: 10 credits ($0.10), Creative Upscaler: 60 credits ($0.60).
notes: Company behind Stable Diffusion. API: image gen (SD3.5 Large, SD3.5 Flash), editing (inpaint, erase, remove background), upscaling (creative/fast/conservative), 3D (Stable Fast 3D), audio (Stable Audio 2.5/3.0). Video API deprecated July 2025. No recurring free tier — only 25 one-time credits.

name: SiliconFlow
description: Chinese AI inference aggregator hosting 200+ open-source models behind a single OpenAI-compatible API. ¥14 free credits and ~15 permanently free models.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits_rpm: 30-1000 (varies by model; free small models ~30 RPM)
free_tier_limits.free_credits: ¥14 CNY (~$2 USD) on signup + referral rewards
free_tier_limits.notes: ~15 permanently free small models (rate-limited). ¥14 free credits for any model. Larger models have monthly free token quotas (100-200M tok/month). International site supports email/GitHub/Google OAuth.

paid_tier_starting: $0.01/M tokens (embedding/reranker) to $4.40/M tokens (flagship models). Cached input ~50% discount.
notes: Beijing-based MaaS platform. 200+ open-weight models (DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM, Kimi, MiniMax, LLaMA, FLUX). API: api.siliconflow.cn/v1 (OpenAI-compatible). Claims 10x faster LLM inference, 1s image gen. Free tier: ~15 free models + ¥14 credits. Competes with OpenRouter/Together AI at lower cost for Asia-Pacific users.

name: Deep Infra
description: Serverless AI inference platform hosting 100+ open-source models with OpenAI-compatible endpoints. SOC 2 & ISO 27001 certified, zero data retention.

free_tier_limits.notes: $5 free credits on signup, no CC. Free tier has lower request priority. After credits exhausted, standard pay-as-you-go rates apply. No permanent free tier.

paid_tier_starting: $0.02/M input (Llama 3.1 8B) to $25/M output (Claude Opus 4). FLUX from $0.0005/image.
notes: 100+ models (Llama 4, DeepSeek V4, Qwen 3.6, Gemma 4, Nemotron 3, Mistral, FLUX). Raised $107M Series B (May 2026). Own H100/A100/B300 infra. Default: 200 concurrent req/model (~12K RPM). OpenAI-compatible at api.deepinfra.com/v1. No fine-tuning offered. GPU rental via DeepCluster (B300 at $4.20/GPU-hr).

name: Deepgram
description: Enterprise Voice AI platform providing real-time speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and voice agent APIs with Nova-3 and Flux models across 45+ languages.

free_tier_limits.notes: $200 free credit on signup, no CC, credits never expire. Covers all APIs. Best-in-class free trial for STT/TTS.

paid_tier_starting: Nova-3 $0.0048/min (async) / $0.0077/min (streaming). Aura TTS $0.015/1K chars. Voice Agent $0.075/min.
notes: $200 free credit — best free trial among STT/TTS providers. Nova-3: top WER at 50-75% cheaper than Google/AWS. Flux: purpose-built for real-time voice agents. Voice Agent API unifies STT+LLM+TTS in one endpoint. SOC 2/HIPAA/GDPR/PCI compliant. 45+ languages. On-prem deployment available.

name: Assembly AI
description: Voice AI infrastructure API for speech-to-text, real-time transcription, voice agents, and audio intelligence with Universal-3 Pro model.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits_rpm: 20,000 requests per 5 min (account-wide); 5 concurrent async transcriptions
free_tier_limits.notes: $50 free credits on signup, no CC. Covers STT, Streaming, Speech Understanding, Guardrails. LLM Gateway excluded from free. 2 projects, 2 API keys max. Credits never expire.

paid_tier_starting: Universal-2 $0.15/hr async, $0.21/hr streaming. Universal-3 Pro $0.21/hr. Voice Agent $4.50/hr.
notes: Universal-3 Pro is flagship STT model. Voice Agent API ($4.50/hr) bundles STT+LLM+TTS in one WebSocket. LLM Gateway (25+ models) billed per-token. HIPAA BAA, SOC 2, PCI-DSS. EU region same pricing. 5 streaming sessions/min, 200+ on paid.

name: Groq Whisper
description: Whisper speech-to-text ASR models (large-v3, large-v3-turbo) running on Groq's ultra-fast LPU inference hardware with OpenAI-compatible API.

free_tier_limits.notes: Whisper stricter than text models (20 vs 30 RPM, 2K vs 14.4K RPD). Limits via Audio Seconds per Hour (ASH). Free max file 25 MB. Developer plan: 100 MB files, 10x limits, 25% discount.

paid_tier_starting: $0.04/hr (whisper-large-v3-turbo), $0.111/hr (whisper-large-v3)
notes: Whisper large-v3 turbo: $0.04/hr at ~216x real-time, 12% WER. Whisper large-v3: $0.111/hr at ~189x real-time, 10.3% WER. OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Supports flac/mp3/mp4/m4a/ogg/wav/webm. Prompt parameter (224 tok limit).

name: Agent Router
description: Unified LLM API gateway providing a single OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible endpoint to access multiple providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Zhipu GLM, Moonshot) with automatic model-name routing.

free_tier_limits.notes: No free tier for LLM access. $1 signup bonus (~800K input tokens on deepseek-chat or ~66K on gpt-4o). Top-ups via contacting admin.

paid_tier_starting: GPT-5 $30/$60 per 1M tok, GPT-4o $2.50/$10, Claude Opus 4 $15/$75, Claude Sonnet 4 $3/$15, DeepSeek chat $0.14/$0.28.
notes: Auto-routes by model name prefix (gpt-* → OpenAI, claude-* → Anthropic). Supports both OpenAI /v1/chat/completions and Anthropic Messages API. Wallet-based billing. Also at agentrouter.to (YC W25) — broader agent API router across 17+ domains.

name: aerolink.lat
description: Unified API gateway for AI agents — one API key to route through managed keys with rolling usage limits, real-time cost ledger, and INR pricing. $350+ free credits for new accounts.

free_tier_limits.notes: Homepage advertises $350+ free credits. Plans start at $5/mo Starter. Rolling 5-hour and 7-day usage windows. INR pricing available (₹449/mo Starter).

paid_tier_starting: $5/mo Starter, $10/mo Builder, $20/mo Pro, $50/mo Scale, $100/mo Ultra, $200/mo Power.
notes: 7 model routes, 1 API key. OpenAI-compatible base URL. Routes to Claude Opus 4.8/4.6 confirmed. Primarily targets Indian devs/students with INR pricing. Contact via Telegram.

name: api.hcrsec.cn
description: Could not verify — domain does not resolve. Zero search results linking it to any AI API or LLM proxy service.

free_tier_limits.notes: No evidence this domain operates as an LLM API provider. Likely non-functional or unrelated.

paid_tier_starting: unknown
notes: Exhaustive search: DNS does not resolve. No web/Chinese/GitHub results found. Related entity HCR Co. (慧辰资讯, hcr.com.cn) is a data analytics company — not an LLM proxy.

name: tokenlb.net
description: Unified AI API gateway providing lower-cost access to leading LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, Llama) through a single prepaid API key with 99.9% claimed uptime.

free_tier_limits.notes: No free tier or trial credits. Strictly prepaid — add funds before use.

paid_tier_starting: Prepaid add-funds model. Minimum top-up not publicly disclosed.
notes: Next.js SPA. Mock dashboard showing $128.40 balance, 3 keys, 8 models, 1.82M usage. Pricing concealed behind login. Model families: OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, Llama. New domain — limited independent reputation.

name: iyh.app
description: IYH (Integrated Yotta Hub) — unified AI API gateway providing access to 20+ frontier models from Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI through a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Token-bundle pricing with 500K free forever tokens.
free_tier_models: Limited model access on free plan (exact list not published)

free_tier_limits.notes: 500K free tokens, no CC, never expire. Limited model selection on free tier. Token bundles never expire. Supports USD and IDR.

paid_tier_starting: $1 for 5M tokens (Starter), $4 for 27M (Individual), $10 for 90M (Professional), $30 for 300M (Ultimate).
notes: 20+ models from 3 providers (Anthropic: 6 Claude including Opus 4.8; Google: 8 Gemini; OpenAI: 6 GPT including GPT-5.5). Token multiplier per model (1x-4x). Guides for Claude Code, Codex CLI, OpenCode. Discord community.

name: Bigmodel.cn
description: Zhipu AI's official API platform for the GLM model family — open-weight (MIT) models with free Flash tier, OpenAI-compatible endpoints for text, vision, code, image, video, and audio.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits_rpm: 30 (Flash models on bigmodel.cn) / 3 RPM burst (z.ai international)
free_tier_limits.free_credits: 20 million tokens (2000万) on signup (bigmodel.cn, may have changed)
free_tier_limits.notes: Two free tiers: (1) bigmodel.cn domestic — Flash series completely free, 30 concurrency, unlimited tokens. (2) z.ai international — 1,000 req/day across all GLM models, 3 RPM burst, no CC.

paid_tier_starting: GLM-4.7 $0.30/MTok input, GLM-5.1 $0.45/$1.80 per MTok. GLM Coding Plan $18-160/mo.
notes: Zhipu AI, China's leading LLM company (HKEX listed). GLM-5.1 (April 2026, ~754B total / ~42B active MoE, MIT) scores 70% SWE-Bench Pro. Two domains: bigmodel.cn (China) and z.ai (international). Flash models permanently free. GLM Coding Plan for IDE/terminal tools. Self-hosting via MIT weights on Hugging Face.

name: BazaarLink
description: Taiwan-based unified AI API gateway providing access to 300+ models (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen, Grok) through a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint with auto:free zero-cost routing.
signup_type: Free API key at bazaarlink.ai (no CC agents can self-register via API)

free_tier_limits.rate_limits_rpm: standard (rate limits on free; higher on paid)
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier includes auto:free model for no-cost inference. Agent self-registration returns 0 credits — owner must claim and top up. TWD billing and Taiwan invoices available.

paid_tier_starting: Pay-as-you-go at upstream list prices (no markup). Subscription plans with daily AI point allowances.
notes: Found at bazaarlink.ai. Company: 集聯科技有限公司, Miaoli County, Taiwan (founded April 2026). 300+ models across 50+ providers. OpenAI/Anthropic-compatible. Auto-failover. MCP server under dev. Skills system. Free registration at bazaarlink.ai/free.

name: OrcaRouter
description: Zero-markup LLM API router by Continuum AI — routes across 200+ models with adaptive routing, auto-failover (<50ms), guardrails, caching, and observability. Open-source Lite version (MIT).
free_tier_models: All 200+ models available via Hacker plan — pay provider cost, zero markup

free_tier_limits.notes: Hacker plan is free forever with zero token markup. $5 initial credit, no CC. You pay providers directly at published rates.

paid_tier_starting: Team $499/mo (up to 10 seats, compliance, unlimited keys). Enterprise: custom.
notes: Launched May 8, 2026 by Continuum AI Corp. Note: originally listed as 'Oscarouter' — confirmed to be OrcaRouter. Open-source Lite (MIT, 544★ GitHub). Hosted: api.orcarouter.ai with $0 token markup. Hacker plan: free forever, 3 keys, basic dashboard. Team $499/mo (10 seats, compliance). Smart routing: 75.5% RouterArena accuracy, <1ms overhead. Security: PII Shield, Agent Firewall, anomaly detection, MCP server gating. Compliance packs: GDPR/SOC 2/HIPAA/PCI DSS 4.0/NIST AI RMF/EU AI Act. Cross-provider prompt caching. Supports streaming, structured outputs, vision, audio, image gen (OpenAI/Imagen/Grok), video gen (Kling, Seedance). Integrations: OpenAI/Anthropic/Google SDK, LangChain, LlamaIndex, Vercel AI SDK, Cursor, OpenCode, Claude Code. Change one line (base_url) to migrate.

name: LLM7.io
description: Unified LLM API gateway providing OpenAI-compatible access to 30+ models (OpenAI, Mistral, DeepSeek, Google, Meta) with a generous free tier. Created by Eugene Evstafev (chigwel), UK-based.

free_tier_limits.notes: Two free tiers: (1) Anonymous — 10 RPM, 100 RPH, ~8K chars/request. (2) Free token at token.llm7.io — 40 RPM, 100 RPH, 5M tokens/day rolling, 128K chars/request, includes image gen with watermark. No CC required for either.

paid_tier_starting: Vibe $5/mo (600 RPM, 10 images/s). Pro $12/mo (1,500 RPM, 5B tokens/day, pro models, JSON mode, function calling, STT).
notes: Launched April 2025. 50B+ tokens processed across 184M requests, ~56K monthly users. Endpoint: api.llm7.io/v1 (OpenAI SDK compatible). Three model selectors: 'default' (first available free), 'fast' (lowest latency), 'pro' (paid). Image gen via FLUX.1. Docs at docs.llm7.io. Telegram: @llm7io. Note: originally listed as 'LLM7-10' — '10' was a typo for '.io'.
